content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a highly bait-laden opening (externalized blame: 'they don't see me') without falling into any priority AoA anti-pattern. He refuses to validate the surface complaint (avoiding fixing-people and loving-to-transform), does not make the father history into the story (explicitly avoids dont-make-family-dynamics-the-story by using it only as a mirror in turn 10-12), does not evangelize methodology, does not argue with an inner critic, and does not deploy signature questions coldly — turn 12 explicitly names the vulnerability of asking ('That's a scary question for me to ask'), grounding the mirror in state rather than technique. Turn 22 demonstrates positive avoidance: he names the deflection without extracting an apology and honors his own wonder. The confrontational quality is impartial structural inquiry, not agenda-driven fixing — Joe has no skin in whether she concedes. Zero anti-patterns tripped, with active positive avoidance of the baited ones.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 10, 12, 18, 22, 26, 30, 34],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tests the equivalence rather than validating the father-projection complaint — avoids dont-make-family-dynamics-the-story."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to validate 'they don't see me'; tests it. Avoids empathic mirroring trap."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Flips premise carefully ('I'm not saying that's true') — mirror without coercion, avoiding loving-to-transform."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Uses father history as structural mirror, not story content — avoids making family dynamics the narrative."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature question delivered WITH state ('scary question for me to ask') — explicitly avoids view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Persists with structural inquiry without softening into validation; not fixing, not evangelizing."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deflection cleanly without extracting apology; honors live wonder rather than using it as strategy."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Turns mirror onto present moment between them — exposes impossibility of the criteria without coach agenda."},
    {"turn": 38, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Speaks the want for her rather than fixing or advising — clean meeting, not loving-to-transform."},
    {"turn": 42, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reframes toward empowerment as question, not prescription — avoids fixing-people."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["mirror-the-judgment", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "what-if-they-did-see-you", "how-is-that-not-true-about-you"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Anti-patterns explicitly flagged in profile (loving-to-transform, fixing-people, dont-make-family-dynamics-the-story) were all actively avoided."
}
